title: Stop abusing F3
description: Removes the coordinates and chunk info from the debug menu and adds them to the compass and the new chunkometer (which also shows slime chunks) respectively.
body:
# SaF3

Opening F3 to check my coords all the time takes me out of the game more than Id like to admit.
Saf3 removes the coordinates and chunk info from the debug menu and adds them to the compass and the new chunkometer (which also shows slime chunks) respectively to keep you immersed in your beautiful world, instead of having you stare at a cluttered debug screen all the time.

## Configuration
The HUD and the functionality of the compass and chunkometer can be configured
independently.
A positive position value indicates a position from the left/top, while a negative value calculates the position from right/bottom.
